R25M.summary: Weak pipeline sanity baseline; bounded numpy decoder-like pilot with non-replayable digest checkpoint.

R25P.summary: Replayable stronger pilot with clear train/dev decrease and moderate generalization gap.

R25S.summary: Data-first balanced pilot; best-so-far heldout replay loss among R25P/R25S/R25V/R25Y.

R25V.summary: Two-layer same-width architecture ablation; train improved slightly but dev and heldout worsened versus R25S.
R25V.role: architecture ablation that did not help

R25Y.summary: Data-regularization pilot; improved over R25P and R25V but did not beat R25S.
R25Y.role: regularization attempt that did not improve best baseline

must_not_do: do not run training from R25Z
do not approve phase_4 scaled training
do not commit checkpoints or ignored reports
do not treat pilot checkpoints as release artifacts
do not add external model, LoRA, adapter, fine-tune, backend inference, or external storage paths
